headline: Boeing Says ‘Unplanned IT Outage’ Hit Computer Systems as Factory Work From Washington to Florida was Disrupted
summary: Boeing Co.’s commercial and military aircraft production was significantly disrupted coast-to-coast by an unplanned IT outage on Monday, the crucial final day of the financial quarter for the aerospace giant. Outage Hits Factories Across Boeing Network According to a report...

headline: Global Jetliner Market Analysis: Evaluating Commercial Jet Trends and Forecasts
summary: The main market opportunities lie in the competitive landscape among Airbus and Boeing jets, Bombardier’s CSeries, and COMAC's C919, with Embraer’s ERJ 190/195 presenting competition at the lower end. This sector anticipates substantial growth over the next decade.Dublin, July 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Market Overview: Commercial Jet Transports" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering. headline: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
summary: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.

headline: Is BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) Still A Bargain After Its 324% Run?
summary: After a very large 323.8% return over the last 5 years, BAE Systems now trades at a point where both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and earnings multiples indicate the stock may still be pricing in some upside rather than a clear premium. That 323.8% five year return is the key backdrop, as it leaves current holders weighing how much of BAE Systems' story is already reflected in the share price. The recent collaboration with Vantor on next generation imaging...
